keyPoints: Provides a dedicated Application Security platform engineered to a fraud mitigation engine designed to identify anomalous programmatic attempts, credential abuse, and transactional risk..
Integrates Fraud Defense capabilities directly into multi-tier cloud architectures, serving as a key component of the Security, Governance, and Platform Management portfolio.
Encourages standard interface structures (REST APIs, Client SDKs, or console controls) to facilitate rapid cloud resource provisioning.
Enforces the principle of least privilege across resources using Identity and Access Management (IAM) role assignments.
Governs organizational resources hierarchically using folders and projects with inherited configuration policies.
Secures encryption keys and sensitive credentials centrally to avoid plaintext leakage in application codebases.
Optimizes Fraud Defense performance through automated platform scaling and resource balancing.
Enables resource segregation, logical naming conventions, and tag-based configuration policies for Fraud Defense.
Integrates with VPC routing and private service access architectures to secure communication tunnels.
Governs access to Fraud Defense using standard IAM roles (e.g. roles/frauddefense.admin and roles/frauddefense.viewer) for fine-grained permissions.
Supports audit logging to record administrative actions and verify API configuration modifications for compliance reports.
Secures operational payloads using encryption at rest (Google-managed or Customer-Managed Keys via KMS) and SSL/TLS in transit.
Offers regional and multi-regional configuration options, duplicating service state across multiple zones to sustain outage events.
Enforces API quotas and rate limits programmatically to prevent resource starvation and noisy-neighbor interference.
Provides service recovery tools, regular status logs, and high-availability SLAs matching enterprise uptime goals.
Billed based on resource metrics (e.g., operations count, active connections, or gigabytes stored) allowing cost optimization.
Integrates with Cloud Monitoring and Cloud Logging to enable real-time alerting, metrics tracking, and diagnostic dashboards.
Enables command line administration through the gcloud CLI tool, allowing pipeline automation and scripting.

scenarios.scenario: An enterprise wants to construct a secure architectural pattern involving Fraud Defense that blocks public internet ingress and enforces strict access restrictions.
scenarios.solution: Deploy the Fraud Defense resource inside a VPC Service Control perimeter, routing connections privately using Serverless VPC connectors or internal gateways, and assign permissions using IAM roles.

scenarios.scenario: A development team needs to build automated CI/CD configurations that configure and audit Fraud Defense operations on a regular basis while tracking costs.
scenarios.solution: Use Cloud Build scripts executing 'gcloud' commands to provision the Fraud Defense resources, enable Cloud Audit Logs, and configure budget notifications at the project folder level.

commands.description: Create or configure a new Fraud Defense resource
commands.command:
gcloud frauddefense create prod-frauddefense-resource \
  --region=us-central1 \
  --description="Production Fraud Defense Resource"

commands.description: List active Fraud Defense instances and query configuration states
